indicators.name: large L-shaped desk with dual monitors
indicators.rationale: A large desk with dual monitors is suitable for extended computer work.

indicators.name: ergonomic mesh office chairs
indicators.rationale: Ergonomic chairs with lumbar support are beneficial for long periods of computer use.

indicators.name: directional task lighting
indicators.rationale: Task lighting can reduce eye strain and improve visibility.

indicators.name: closed door providing privacy
indicators.rationale: Enclosed room with door enables acoustic and visual privacy essential for focused solo work.

indicators.name: dedicated low-distraction room layout
indicators.rationale: No high-traffic areas or recreational features compete for attention; the room is wholly work-oriented.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for solo computer work. While it has a large desk with dual monitors and ergonomic chairs, the lighting is not specifically designed for computer work, and the layout is not entirely free of distractions. The presence of a closed door and a dedicated workspace layout does provide some positive aspects.
